summary: Small single-story rectangular commercial-style building with a raised paved perimeter, brick-tiled flat central roof edged by stone slabs, continuous ground-level windows on the long sides, and corner stone pillars. Exterior walls use a light smooth band above a sandstone or light wood lower wall; a white slab border surrounds the building on ground level.

shape.overall_form: simple elongated rectangle, raised base with inset central roof
shape.symmetry: bilaterally symmetric along the long axis (mirrored front/back and left/right corners similar)

elements: continuous horizontal windows (series of glass panes along long walls)
brick flat roof with stone slab coping
raised white slab perimeter (single-block border) surrounding building footprint
wood or plank trim at base of walls
rebuild_hints: Start with a rectangular footprint approximately 9 x 21 blocks on the inner building; add a one-block-wide white slab border around it.

Construct a lower wall of beige blocks (sandstone-like) three blocks high with a 1-block wood/plank trim at the base, then a single smooth white band above it, punctuated by repeating glass window openings along the long sides.
Place stonebrick (or stone) corner pillars 1 block wide that rise the full wall height to meet the white band.
Top with a single-layer brick tile roof inset one block from the outer white border and surrounded by stone slabs as coping.
Windows are contiguous horizontal strips: glass panes set in recess between the lower beige and the white band; repeat evenly along each long side.
uncertainties: Exact block types for the beige lower wall: appears to be sandstone but could be light-colored wood or terracotta (confidence 0.8).
Base trim material under the windows looks like wood planks but could be a differently textured slab (confidence 0.6).
Corner pillar material identified as stonebrick has moderate confidence; texture might be chiseled or regular stone variants (confidence 0.7).
Exact interior layout and any doors are not visible from provided exterior views; entrance location is uncertain.
